title: Recording the execution DNA of AI agents
excerpt: Why we built Chronicle around decision boundaries instead of framework-specific hooks, and how the Envelope format makes agent incidents reproducible.
author: Susheem Koul

title: Tokens as infrastructure: why cost controls break in stochastic systems
excerpt: Traditional cloud cost controls assume deterministic, bounded workloads. Agentic systems violate that assumption — here's what tokenops proposes instead.
author: Susheem Koul
